evals.description: Triggers on request to create a new React Native project
evals.prompt: I want to start a new mobile app for iOS and Android. How do I set up a React Native project?
How do I add tab navigation with a home and profile screen in my Expo app?
My React Native FlatList is super laggy when scrolling through 10,000 items. How do I fix it?

evals.description: Produces correct OTA update setup with EAS Update
evals.prompt: How do I push a hotfix to my React Native app without going through the App Store?

evals.description: Provides correct native module creation with Expo Modules API
evals.prompt: I need to access a native iOS API that Expo doesn't support. How do I create a custom native module?
How do I set up deep linking so that myapp://details/123 opens the right screen?

evals.description: Recommends correct config plugin approach for native customization
evals.prompt: I need to add a custom URL scheme to my Expo app without ejecting. How?

evals.description: Handles re-render prevention correctly without over-memoizing
evals.prompt: My React Native app re-renders too much and feels slow. How do I fix unnecessary re-renders?

evals.description: Catches common gotcha with runtime version mismatch in OTA updates
evals.prompt: My EAS Update keeps failing with a runtime version mismatch error. What's wrong?

evals.description: Does not recommend deprecated expo eject command
evals.prompt: How do I eject from Expo to get access to native code?

evals.description: Does not hallucinate non-existent React Native APIs
evals.prompt: How do I use React Native's built-in NativeRouter for navigation?

evals.description: References the correct reference file for advanced performance work
evals.prompt: I need to deeply optimize my React Native app startup time and reduce memory usage.
How do I set up cloud builds for my Expo app for both iOS and Android?
What is the React Native New Architecture and should I enable it?
